Package org.rodinp.core.tests

Class MarkerTests

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.tests.AbstractRodinDBTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.ModifyingResourceTests
org.rodinp.core.tests.MarkerTests
public class MarkerTests extends ModifyingResourceTests
Tests about Rodin markers.

    void
    testDBMarker()
    Ensures that a problem marker can be set on the Rodin database.
    void
    testFileMarker()
    Ensures that a problem marker can be set on a Rodin File.
    void
    testFileMarkerInexistent()
    Ensures that a problem marker cannot be set on an inexistent Rodin File.
    void
    testInexistentMarker()
    Ensures that passing an inexistent marker returns null.
    void
    testIntMarkerAttrLoc()
    Ensures that a problem marker can be set on an attribute of a non top-level internal element, together with a location.
    void
    testIntMarkerAttrLocInexistent()
    Ensures that a problem marker cannot be set on an attribute of an inexistent non top-level internal element, together with a location.
    void
    testIntMarkerCopyFile()
    Ensures that a marker on a non top-level internal element is not copied with its Rodin file.
    void
    testIntMarkerMoveFile()
    Ensures that the data stored in a marker on a non top-level internal element is still relevant after moving its file.
    void
    testIntMarkerMoveFileRenaming()
    Ensures that the data stored in a marker on a non top-level internal element is still relevant after moving its file with renaming.
    void
    testIntMarkerRenameFile()
    Ensures that the data stored in a marker on a non top-level internal element is still relevant after renaming its file.
    void
    testMarkerAttrBadLoc()
    Ensures that a problem marker cannot be set with a partial location.
    void
    testMarkerAttrBool()
    Ensures that a problem marker can be set on an attribute of an internal element, when the attribute is of kind "boolean".
    void
    testMarkerAttrHandle()
    Ensures that a problem marker can be set on an attribute of an internal element, when the attribute is of kind "handle".
    void
    testMarkerAttrInexistent()
    Ensures that a problem marker can be set on an inexistent attribute of an internal element.
    void
    testMarkerAttrInt()
    Ensures that a problem marker can be set on an attribute of an internal element, when the attribute is of kind "integer".
    void
    testMarkerAttrLocInexistent()
    Ensures that a problem marker cannot be set on an inexistent attribute of an internal element, together with a location.
    void
    testMarkerAttrLocNull()
    Ensures that a problem marker can be set with a null attribute id.
    void
    testMarkerAttrLong()
    Ensures that a problem marker can be set on an attribute of an internal element, when the attribute is of kind "long".
    void
    testMarkerAttrNull()
    Ensures that a problem marker can be set with a null attribute id.
    void
    testMarkerNoAttrLoc()
    Ensures that a problem marker cannot be set with a location but no attribute.
    void
    testNonRodinMarker()
    Ensures that passing a non-Rodin marker throws an exception.
    void
    testNullMarkerAccess()
    Ensures that passing a null marker to an inquiry method throws an exception.
    void
    testProblem()
    Ensure that mapping from IRodinProblem to error code works in both ways.

    Ensures that a problem marker can be set on a Rodin Project.

    Ensures that a problem marker cannot be set on an inexistent Rodin Project.
